evals.prompt: Track this application — Acme platform-engineer role: <URL>
evals.expected_output: ingest-website cleans the posting; application schema applied; wiki/career/applications/{acme}-{platform-engineer}.md page created with stage tracking.

evals.prompt: Save this LinkedIn job posting I'm applying to.
evals.expected_output: ingest-website + application schema; structured application page created with company, role, posting snapshot, deadline if present.

evals.prompt: Ingest this recruiter email — they reached out about a senior IC role.
evals.expected_output: Paste handling; application page scaffolded with the role, source 'recruiter outreach', and stage 'inbound'.
